prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall with warm wood textures; Ren Ashbell, an androgynous adventurer in a guild cloak and leather armor, stands before Celestia Vale, a feminine fallen princess in a travel dress. Ren presents a sealed quest parcel to Celestia with both hands extended in a clear handoff motion. Lively guild background, soft cinematic anime lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot; Celestia Vale gracefully accepts the sealed parcel from Ren Ashbell. After the transfer, both characters bow slightly to each other to complete the interaction. Consistent character appearances and warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
